mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_ai_feedback_setting ( user_id, speech_tone_cd, feedback_style_cd, intensity_cd, question_cd, length_cd, lang_mode_cd, fixed_lang ) SELECT u.user_id, 'POLITE', 'BALANCED', 'NORMAL', 'ASK', 'MEDIUM', 'FOLLOW_DIARY', NULL FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_user_ai_feedback_setting s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND s.user_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, speech_tone_cd, feedback_style_cd, intensity_cd, question_cd, length_cd, lang_mode_cd, fixed_lang, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user_ai_feedback_setting WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_ai_feedback_setting SET speech_tone_cd = #{speechToneCd}, feedback_style_cd = #{feedbackStyleCd}, intensity_cd = #{intensityCd}, question_cd = #{questionCd}, length_cd = #{lengthCd}, lang_mode_cd = #{langModeCd}, fixed_lang = #{fixedLang}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
